script: const getAudioPath=async(e,t,o,i)=>{let a=require("path"),s=require("fs"),n=new Date().getTime()+".mp3";return s.existsSync(a.join(o,"tts"))?(s.writeFileSync(a.join(o,"tts",n),await getTTSAudio(e,t,i)),console.log("folder already exists")):(s.mkdirSync(a.join(o,"tts")),s.writeFileSync(a.join(o,"tts",n),await getTTSAudio(e,t,i)),console.log("folder created successfully")),a.join(o,"tts",n)},getTTSAudio=async(e,t,o)=>{let i=o.region||"eastus",a=o.apiKey||"",s=o.voiceName||"en-US-AvaMultilingualNeural",n="audio-16khz-128kbitrate-mono-mp3",r=`<speak version='1.0' xml:lang='en-US'><voice name='${s}'><prosody rate='${t?`${Math.round((t-1)*100)}%`:"0%"}'>${e}</prosody></voice></speak>`,c=`https://${i}.tts.speech.microsoft.com/cognitiveservices/v1`,l=require("axios");return new Promise((e,t)=>{l.post(c,r,{headers:{"Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key":a,"Content-Type":"application/ssml+xml","X-Microsoft-OutputFormat":n,"User-Agent":"koodo-reader"},responseType:"arraybuffer"}).then(t=>{console.log(t),e(t.data)}).catch(e=>{console.log(e),t("")})})},getTTSVoice=async e=>{let t=e.region||"eastus",o=e.apiKey||"",i=`https://${t}.tts.speech.microsoft.com/cognitiveservices/voices/list`,a=require("axios");return new Promise((t,s)=>{a.get(i,{headers:{"Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key":o}}).then(o=>{console.log(o);t(o.data.map(t=>({name:t.ShortName,gender:t.Gender.toLowerCase(),locale:t.Locale,displayName:`Azure TTS - ${t.LocalName} (${t.Locale}) - ${t.Gender}`,plugin:"azure-tts-voice-plugin",config:{...e,voiceName:t.ShortName}})))}).catch(e=>{console.log(e),s("")})})};global.getAudioPath=getAudioPath,global.getTTSVoice=getTTSVoice;
